title: Pour Some Sugar on Me
why_this_song: Pour Some Sugar on Me by Def Leppard (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "Sometime, anytime, sugar me sweet"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Pour some sugar on me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Razzle and a dazzle and a flash a little light"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Sometime, anytime, sugar me sweet"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Break the bubble, break it up"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sugar" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sugar" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "pour" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "pour" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Red light, yellow light, green light, go
You got the peaches, I got the cream

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Take a bottle, shake it up
From my head, my head, to my feet

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Pour Some Sugar on Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Pour Some Sugar on Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Pour Some Sugar on Me" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Pour Some Sugar on Me"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Def Leppard one question about "Pour Some Sugar on Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Def Leppard sobre "Pour Some Sugar on Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
